author: IGN RSS
text:
Nicolas Cage Says Christopher Nolan Won't 'Call Me Back' After Turning Down Insomnia Role
Nicolas Cage has said that The Odyssey director Christopher Nolan is on the list of filmmakers who "don't call me back" after he turned him down for a movie.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Sebastian Stan Reveals He Plays "Many Roles" in The Batman: Part II
Sebastian Stan obliquely addressed his casting in The Batman: Part II while at the Cannes Film Festival this weekend. Although neither Stan nor director Matt Reeves have directly confirmed that his role is that of District Attorney Harvey Dent, Stan told the press at Cannes that he plays “many roles in this one,” which suggests that Dent will indeed transform into his villainous alter ego Two-Face in the sequel.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Idris Elba Says He Was Never in the Race to Play James Bond for New 007 Movie
Idris Elba isn't just taking himself out of the running to play James Bond in the new 007 movie – he says he was never in the race to begin with.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Karmine Corp Crowned Champions of Rocket League Paris Major
Karmine Corp captured the 2026 RLCS Paris Major championship in front of a roaring hometown crowd, just as Rocket League shocked fans with an Unreal Engine 6 teaser.

author: IGN RSS
text: The Best Deals Today: RX 9070 XT, M5 MacBook Air, LEGO Back to the Future, and More

author: IGN RSS
text:
Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu Opened to an Estimated $165 Million at the Box Office
Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu brought in an estimated $165 million at the global box office during the four-day Memorial Day holiday. Here's how that compares to Solo: A Star Wars Story.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Rocket League to Receive First Game Engine Tune Up in 11 Years as Psyonix Teases Unreal Engine 6 Update
Psyonix has announced Rocket League will finally leave Unreal Engine 3 after 11 years with a first look at some of the changes included in its big Unreal Engine 6 update.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Star Citizen Officially Crosses the $1 Billion Funding Raised Barrier as $5,000 Spaceship You Can't Fly In-Game Goes on Sale
Star Citizen has crossed the $1 billion funding raised barrier — a significant milestone for the space sim that came shortly after a new $5,000 virtual spaceship you can't fly in-game went on sale.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Unreal Engine 6 Revealed as Rocket League Gets a New Coat of Paint
Epic Games developer Psyonix has published a sneak peek at an updated version of Rocket League running in Unreal Engine 6, revealing a first look at its new logo.

author: IGN RSS
text:
007 First Light Leaks Prompt IO Interactive to Publish Gameplay Early
IO Interactive has published a portion of the opening mission from 007 First Light after copies of the game leaked to the public days before launch.

author: IGN RSS
text: How to Read The Sun Eater Books and Novellas in Order

author: IGN RSS
text:
Black Flag’s Edward Kenway Is the Best Assassin Because He Doesn’t Care for the Creed
There are plenty of great Assassin's Creed protagonists, but Black Flag's Edward Kenway is the very best because he doesn't care for any of the lore.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Hands Over, a Horror Party Game, Announced for PC
Hands Over is a new multiplayer horror party game that takes some of your favorite childhood mini-games and gives them a deadly twist. It's in development for PC from Artdock.

author: IGN RSS
text:
How X-Men ’97 and Devil May Cry’s Studio Mir Became a Backbone of American Animation
From The Legend of Korra to X-Men ’97 to Devil May Cry, Korea's Studio Mir has become a major contributor to the growth of animation in the West.

author: IGN RSS
text:
A Petition Calling on Sony to Greenlight Destiny 3 Has Over 120,000 Signatures Already — and It's Rising Fast
An online petition calling on Sony to greenlight the development of Destiny 3 has seen over 120,000 signatures, but it seems unlikely that the game will be made.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Rocket League Devs Explain How Unreal Engine Powers the Paris Major
Rocket League developers at the Paris Major detail how Epic Games uses Unreal Engine to run live stadium tech and eliminate competitive match lag.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Ranking the Star Wars Movies From Worst to Best
We've ranked the entire catalog of live-action Star Wars movies from best to worst, including The Mandalorian and Grogu.

author: IGN RSS
text:
Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Confirmed to Feature Drunk Load Screen After Ubisoft Post Confuses Fans
Ubisoft has confirmed Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced will still let Edward Kenway get drunk and stumble around the Animus load screen, despite concerns to the contrary.

author: IGN RSS
text:
The Boys Actor Antony Starr Says Goodbye to Homelander With Spoiler-Heavy Behind-the-Scenes Photos
Now that The Boys is finally over, actor Antony Starr has taken to Instagram to bid farewell to his time as Homelander with a very spoiler-y photo gallery.
